Thomas Eastridge, Esq (510-530-1700) for Paul Wiley, Plaintiff and Opposing Party.

ARGUED. The Court adopts it's tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Bristol, Viskontas, And Burke'S Special Motion To Strike is DENIED. Marlin v. Aimco Venezia, LLC (2007) 154 Cal.App.4th 154. Whether plaintiff's complaint states a valid cause of action (versus remedy) is not a proper issue to be addressed by a motion to strike, especially where the first prong of CCP 425.16 is not met. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Reported. (D501)
